_comment: The prod plugin index — a plain JSON file, no backend. To list a provider plugin, open a pull request adding an entry below: name (the alias users type), repo (github.com/org/repo), maintainer, description, and the exact install command. `prod plugin search` reads this file. A hosted, signed registry is a commercial-tier decision, not this.

plugins.name: example
plugins.description: Reference provider plugin. Copy it (or run `prod plugin new`) to add your own cloud.
